instruction: Generate a complete GROMACS workflow to calculate the density of pure water at 300 K and 1 bar.
expected_workflow: Generate water box using gmx solvate
Count water molecules and create topology
Run grompp and mdrun for energy minimization

common_errors_and_fixes.error: topol.top does not exist when using gmx solvate -p
common_errors_and_fixes.fix: Create topology manually after generating the water box and counting water molecules.

common_errors_and_fixes.error: Too many warnings due to Berendsen barostat
common_errors_and_fixes.fix: Use C-rescale barostat for NPT equilibration.

user_task: Generate a GROMACS post-processing workflow to calculate the mass density profile of pure water along the z direction at 300 K.
expected_gromacs_commands: echo System | gmx density -f md.xtc -s md.tpr -o density_profile_z.xvg -d Z -sl 100
important_rules: Do not skip topology preparation if a full workflow is requested.
For NPT equilibration, prefer C-rescale barostat.
Explain group selection for gmx density.
Use the z direction explicitly with -d Z.
If trajectory length is short, state that the density profile is only workflow validation.
common_errors: Forgetting to specify the z direction.
Reporting a short-trajectory density profile as final publication-quality data.
Not explaining bin number or slab resolution.
validation_note: The workflow is valid if gmx density produces density_profile_z.xvg with a reasonable mass-density distribution along the z direction. Short trajectories should be treated as workflow validation only.

instruction: Generate a GROMACS post-processing workflow to calculate the oxygen-oxygen radial distribution function of pure water at 300 K.
expected_workflow: Select water oxygen atoms using name OW
Run gmx rdf with OW as both reference and selection
Extract the first RDF peak position and peak height
expected_command: gmx rdf -f md.xtc -s md.tpr -o rdf_OW_OW.xvg -ref "name OW" -sel "name OW"

common_errors_and_fixes.fix: Run the analysis command inside the folder where rdf_OW_OW.xvg is saved, or provide the full file path.
Ensure production MD was run with nstxout-compressed greater than 0.
Check atom names in the structure file or create an index group for water oxygen atoms.
